case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. CAMILLE COATS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. , AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COATS, CAMILLE $4,408.67 PRINCIPAL, $383.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,791.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76057910)
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 75179405) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. , AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75179405) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. , AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT COATS, CAMILLE DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-09-2025

SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 75179405) TO PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. , AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $383.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 76057910) AS TO DEFENDANT COATS, CAMILLE
